pages.title: Metal Shaping
pages.text: The Crude Anvil and Tool Forge shape metal.$(p)$(bold)Shaping order:$()$(li)Place the pattern$(li)Add the required ingots$(li)Heat to minimum forge heat$(li)Hammer to the shown hit count$(p)Armour plate patterns also need the matching finished chainmail armour as a target.

pages.title: Assembly
pages.text: Bring compatible finished parts to the Toolmaker's Station.$(p)The assembled tool records:$(li)Head$(li)Handle$(li)Guard$(li)Binding or wrap$(li)Treatment$(li)Quality$(p)Changing any recorded component can change the calculated result.
